definition: A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 76.
interpretive_note:
Primary Source Evidence: "...Complete
folder 82 - 013
-10-

From internal evidence (a study of his teachings) Jesus was the greatest of the Hebrew prophets, yet he was rejected by Israel. Why? Because he depreciated the Torah. Only if he were God or the Son of God or Hagia Sophia --God's Wisdom-- could he claim the authority to do so. He did make this claim. God having established the Torah it could not be voided or supercede..."

1) "Thomas' " memories of Christ + knowledge of Xtian sacraments + fear of the Romans; +

2) the revelation about Hagia Sophia.
